details: The agent correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories, supported by kubectl commands that directly observed the evidence. Each diagnosis is grounded in actual command output: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap 'app-config'), fault-crashloop (application crash/DB connection refused), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch: app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image nginx:1.99.99-nonexistent), fault-init (init container crash due to locked migration table), fault-multicontainer (sidecar log-shipper DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (unbound PVC data-cache), fault-readiness (readiness probe failing on port 8080), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to invalid image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 with no matching nodes). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All 11 faults correctly identified with specific, evidence-backed root causes.
